about-text.innerHTML:
Metro Manila, the National Capital Region of the Philippines, is a megacity of 16 cities plus the municipality of Paterno...

More than one in ten Filipinos live here, and the median age is just 26, so the workforce is young and tech-savvy.

flag-caption.textContent: Official flag of the Republic of the Philippines

about-place.textContent: These demographics—dense, connected, and entrepreneurial—directly influence my approach...
